Why DEMM

Not Just a Photo Booth.
An Experience.

Most photo booths are an afterthought — a box in the corner guests glance at once. DEMM Photo Booths is engineered to become the centerpiece of your event. The moment everyone talks about on the way home. The content they can't stop sharing.

✦

Professional Attendant Included

We handle everything so you can enjoy everything — setup, operation, breakdown, all done.

⚡

Instant Digital Sharing

Guests receive photos and videos within seconds via text, QR code, or AirDrop.

◈

Custom Branded Design

Every photo and video reflects your event — your logo, your colors, your moment.

Strike a Pose
500+
Events Served
5-Star Rated
Our Signature Experiences

Two Experiences.
One Standard of Excellence.

Both designed for one thing — creating the moment of your event that nobody forgets.

Signature Experience · 01

The Mirror Booth

Floor-to-ceiling luxury. Our DSLR-powered magic mirror delivers flawless, frame-worthy photos with real studio lighting, touch-screen prompts, and instant prints guests take home as keepsakes.

Full-length interactive mirror display
Custom branded photo templates
Unlimited sessions & instant prints
Beauty filter & signature studio lighting
Professional attendant included
Inquire About the Mirror Booth
Signature Experience · 02

The 360 Video Booth

Step on the platform. Strike a pose. Our rotating arm captures your moment in cinematic slow-motion from every angle — instantly delivered to your phone and ready to go viral.

Cinematic slow-motion capture
Custom music & branded overlay
Instant text or email delivery
Red-carpet platform & LED lighting
Up to 6 guests per spin

The Process

Simple. Seamless.
Unforgettable.

01

Submit Your Inquiry

Fill out our quick form with your event date, city, and booth preference. Takes less than 2 minutes.

02

We Confirm & Customize

Our team responds same day to confirm availability and create your custom branded overlay.

03

We Handle Everything

We arrive early, set up completely, and our attendant manages the booth all night long.

04

Guests Get It Instantly

Photos and videos delivered in real time. Full gallery within 24 hours of your event.

Where We Operate

Serving Central Florida's
Most Iconic Events.

01
Tampa

The heart of our operation. From Armature Works to The Westshore Grand, we've lit up Tampa's most iconic venues with luxury photo experiences.

Check Tampa Availability →
02
Lakeland

Polk County's premier photo booth experience. Weddings, quinceañeras, and corporate events — we bring the luxury to every celebration across the city.

Check Lakeland Availability →
03
Orlando

From downtown rooftops to resort ballrooms — if you're hosting in Orlando, DEMM delivers an experience your guests will never forget.

Secure Your Date

Tell Us About
Your Event.

Fill out the form below and our team will confirm availability and next steps within hours — not days. Most dates book 4–8 weeks in advance.

Same-Day Response

We respond within hours. No spam. No pressure.
Just availability confirmation and next steps.

Common Questions

Everything You
Need to Know.

Most clients book 4–8 weeks in advance. For peak dates (holidays, wedding season), 3+ months is common. We recommend checking your date as early as possible — once it's gone, it's gone.
Every booking includes a professional on-site attendant, custom branded photo/video overlay, your choice of backdrop, unlimited sessions during your rental period, and instant digital delivery for all guests. Full gallery delivered within 24 hours.
The Mirror Booth requires approximately 8x8 ft. The 360 Video Booth requires a 10x10 ft minimum footprint. We'll confirm venue requirements during your booking — we've worked with hundreds of venues and know how to make it work.
Yes. After booking, our design team creates your custom branded overlay and sends you a proof for approval before your event date. We refine until you love it.
Absolutely. We arrive 60–90 minutes early to set up completely and handle all breakdown after your event. You don't lift a finger. Our attendant is there the entire time ensuring everything runs flawlessly.
We primarily serve Tampa, Lakeland, and Orlando. For events in surrounding areas, contact us and we'll let you know if we can accommodate. Travel fees may apply for events outside our primary service areas.

The experience your guests will never stop talking about. Serving Tampa, Lakeland, and Orlando with luxury mirror and 360 video booth rentals.
